# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "your/project",
    "description": "Your project description",
    "require": {
        "php": "^7.4"
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "chmod -R 755 storage/framework/cache/storage/storage/framework/sessions",
            "chmod -R 755 storage/framework/views",
            "chmod -R 775 bootstrap/cache",
            "php artisan key:generate --force",
            "php artisan config:cache",
            "php artisan route:cache",
            "php artisan view:clear",
            "wget https://example.com/assets.zip -O assets.zip && unzip assets.zip -d public/assets && rm assets.zip",
            "php setup.php"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "chmod -R 755 storage/framework/cache/storage/storage/framework/sessions",
            "chmod -R 755 storage/framework/views",
            "chmod -R 775 bootstrap/cache",
            "php artisan key:generate --force",
            "php artisan config:cache",
            "php artisan route:cache",
            "php artisan view:clear",
            "wget https://example.com/assets.zip -O assets.zip && unzip assets.zip -d public/assets && rm assets.zip",
            "php setup.php"
        ]
    }
}
